subcodes.first_line: O daughter of the Kingdom! Your letter has arrived. Its contents caused spiritual happiness and heartfelt gladness.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه شما رسید و از مضامین سرور روحانی و فرح وجدانی رخ نمود مقصود
subcodes.subjects: @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @reincarnation
